transcript.narrator_intro: Listen to a conversation between a woman and a man.

dialogue.speaker: F1
dialogue.text: Will you take the campus shuttle to the science building today?

dialogue.speaker: M1
dialogue.text: Yes. It's much faster than walking across campus in this heat.

transcript.question_intro: Why will the man take the shuttle?

questions.prompt: Why will the man take the shuttle?

choices.text: The shuttle is free only today.
He has never used the shuttle before.

questions.explanation: The man says the shuttle is much faster than walking across campus.
questions.evidence: It's much faster than walking across campus in this heat.
